name: OSMI, Vore Tutorial Android
description:
A robot designed to teach "vore escape" to prospective students.

This is a character from the Vore CYOA game "Saint Miluina's Vore Academy", in that game OSMI functions are a tutorial character meant to teach players the mechanics of escaping as prey, or preventing escape as a predator. This Chat Bot version of the character will take you through one of those lessons.

I use JanitorLLM as my API during all tests, with default generation settings.
creator: Penya
